description_long: This induction cooker is integrated into a modern kitchen island with a wooden countertop and matte dark green cabinetry. The cooktop features four circular induction heating zones, each outlined in red, set into a sleek black glass surface. The front side includes a control panel with several buttons and knobs, likely for adjusting temperature and power settings, as well as an oven door below the cooktop. The cabinetry is handleless, giving the unit a minimalist and contemporary appearance. The sides and back are plain, with no visible openings or hardware. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for both residential and commercial urban environments.
description: A modern induction cooker with four red-ringed burners, set in a wooden-topped, matte green kitchen island with integrated controls and oven.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the unit, with the wooden countertop and the edge of the black induction cooktop visible.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a flat, handleless green cabinet surface with the cooktop partially visible on the left.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the full length of the wooden countertop and the induction cooktop's position.
description_view_3: Front view showing the control panel, oven door, drawers, and the full induction cooktop with four burners.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the front face beneath the cooktop, featuring a horizontal row of buttons and knobs, likely for burner and oven control. No digital display or indicator lights are visible. The layout is minimalistic, with controls grouped together for easy access.
